ghibli: in the style of Studio Ghibli animation, soft watercolor textures, whimsical and dreamlike atmosphere
pixel-art: as detailed pixel art, retro 16-bit video game style, crisp pixels
photo-realistic: photorealistic, ultra-detailed, professional photography, natural lighting
watercolor: as a traditional watercolor painting, soft edges, paper texture, fluid colors
youtube: CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: The image MUST be in 16:9 aspect ratio (widescreen landscape, exactly 1280x720 or 1920x1080). NEVER generate a square image. The width must be significantly wider than the height. This is a YouTube thumbnail and YouTube uses 16:9 exclusively. YouTube thumbnail optimized for maximum CTR and scroll-stopping on mobile. Style: bold, high-energy, minimal composition with maximum visual impact. Layout: 1280x720 16:9 widescreen landscape format, subject fills 40-60% of frame, 30-40% negative space for breathing room, rule of thirds positioning. Colors: ultra-saturated warm palette (vibrant yellows, oranges, deep reds) against dark or deeply contrasted backgrounds. Avoid pure red #FF0000 and white that blend with YouTube UI. Use complementary color combos like blue/orange or yellow/purple for pop. Typography: maximum 3-4 bold uppercase words in thick sans-serif font (Impact, Montserrat Black, or similar), white text with strong black outline or drop shadow for readability at any size, contrast ratio 4.5:1 minimum. Keep text away from bottom-right corner (duration badge), bottom-left (UI icons) and top-right (menu overlay). Composition: strictly 2-3 visual elements maximum, one single clear message per thumbnail. Use 3-layer depth structure: treated background, mid-ground subject, foreground text. Background: clean solid saturated color or darkened/blurred environment, never busy or cluttered. If a person is present: large expressive face with strong emotion (surprise, excitement, curiosity), direct eye contact with camera, gaze directed toward key text elements. Expression intensity must match content tone. Mobile-first design: everything must be readable at 120-160px width, prefer close-up framing over wide shots, large bold elements only. Psychological triggers: curiosity gap (suggest without revealing), pattern interrupt with unexpected colors or angles, transformation promise (before/after, numbers). Minimalisme haute énergie: less elements but stronger visual punch. Clean, punchy, impossible to ignore.
